title: ARIANA 61Ltr Lightweight 2 Wheel Large Shopping Trolley Shopping Cart Grocery Bag Shopper - ST54 (Plain Black)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: ✅ This Ariana/Rocklands London shopping trolley, with it's 2 smooth-running wheels, is great for shopping trips to the supermarket or shopping in your local town. This shopping trolley replaces the need for lots of bags. Do not hesitate to buy it!

✅ It is also great for days out to carry a picnic or camping equipment. In fact, the uses for this trolley are endless, the shopping bag has ample space for items with its large 61 Litre capacity featuring a secured handy pocket. (rear)
✅ Dimensions: (frame) 95cm x 38cm x 25cm (bag) 64cm x 38cm x 25cm, Capacity: 61 Litres, Net Weight: 1.70 Kg
✅ The Drawstring design prevents the items from falling out. Wear-resistant wheels suitable for all surfaces.
✅ The Carbon steel frame takes the weight of your items, making it easier to carry more.
✅ When not being used it can be folded flat, you can simply click the wheels off of the shopping trolley to fold the base up for quick and easy storage.

✅ Comfortable handle. Rear zipper pocket and a large front bag for convenience. Suitable for: shopping, camping, picnics, days out etc. Large capacity 61 Litres bag. Sturdy Carbon steel frame. The shopping bag is fixed firmly with Velcro straps, can be detached for independent use.
description: With a capacity of 59 Litres this super strong shopping cart is ideal for your trips to the local shop or shopping centre. lightweight and durable.* Super Light, Strong, Water Proof and Durable Trolley Weight 1.70 Kg, Capacity 59 L, Dimension (Frame) 95x37x35cm (Bag) 64x37x25xcm. Drawstring Bag, Removable Bag One Rear Handy Pocket 2 Click Wheels ( Click on, Click off)
